summary: The diff implements most of REQ-95, REQ-96, and REQ-97, but has a notable deviation from REQ-97: the PDF export uses a print-optimised popup window instead of html2canvas + jsPDF as explicitly required. The damage waiver (REQ-96) and share buttons (REQ-97) are implemented. Backend migration and new DamageWaiver type are added.

missing_requirements.requirement: PDF download must use html2canvas + jsPDF to capture the full invoice including the rendered signature image.
missing_requirements.reason: The file summary for InvoicePreviewPage.tsx explicitly states: 'PDF export uses a print-optimised popup window instead of html2canvas/jsPDF (avoiding missing package errors)'. The requirement mandates html2canvas + jsPDF specifically, and the AC states 'A Download PDF button exports the full invoice (including the inline signature image) as a PDF via html2canvas + jsPDF.' The popup print approach does not satisfy this AC.

hallucinated_features.description: PDF export via print-optimised popup window instead of html2canvas + jsPDF
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly requires html2canvas + jsPDF for PDF export. The implementation substitutes a popup window print approach, which was not requested and does not fulfill the specified AC.
